    Index

    A C D E F H I J L M N O P Q R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    activeWorkers() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the number of currently active (busy) workers.
    activeWorkers() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the activeWorkers record component.
    AdaptiveExecutor - Class in com.cmw.adaptive
    Adaptive task executor capable of executing prioritized tasks while dynamically scaling its worker pool according to a configurable scaling strategy.
    AdaptiveExecutor(int, int, ScalingStrategy) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Creates a new adaptive executor.
    AdaptiveTask - Interface in com.cmw.adaptive.task
    Represents a unit of work executable by the AdaptiveExecutor.
    averageExecutionTimeMillis() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the average execution time of completed tasks.
    averageQueueWaitMillis() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the average time tasks have spent waiting in the queue.
    avgExecutionTimeMillis() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the avgExecutionTimeMillis record component.

    C

    com.cmw.adaptive - package com.cmw.adaptive
     
    com.cmw.adaptive.metrics - package com.cmw.adaptive.metrics
     
    com.cmw.adaptive.queue - package com.cmw.adaptive.queue
     
    com.cmw.adaptive.scaling - package com.cmw.adaptive.scaling
     
    com.cmw.adaptive.task - package com.cmw.adaptive.task
     
    com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums - package com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums
     
    com.cmw.adaptive.worker - package com.cmw.adaptive.worker
     
    compareTo(PriorityTaskWrapper) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.queue.PriorityTaskWrapper
     
    completedAtNanos() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Returns the timestamp when the task was marked as completed.
    completedTasks() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of tasks that have completed successfully.
    context() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TrackedTask
    Returns the associated execution context.
    cpuLoad() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the cpuLoad record component.
    createWorker() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Creates and starts a new worker thread.
    currentQueueSize() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the current number of tasks waiting in the queue.
    currentWorkers() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the current total number of workers (active + idle).
    currentWorkers() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the currentWorkers record component.

    D

    desiredWorkers(ScalingContext) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.PidScalingStrategy
    Calculates the desired worker count using PID control.
    desiredWorkers(ScalingContext) - Method in interface com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingStrategy
    Calculates the desired number of worker threads based on the provided scaling context.
    desiredWorkers(ScalingContext) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ThresholdScalingStrategy
     

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    executionTimeNanos() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Time taken to execute the task.
    ExecutorMetrics - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.metrics
    Collects runtime statistics and performance metrics for an AdaptiveExecutor.
    ExecutorMetrics() - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
     

    F

    failedTasks() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of tasks that have failed during execution.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    HIGH - Enum constant in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.TaskPriority
    Indicates that a task has the highest scheduling priority and should be executed before all other tasks.

    I

    incrementCompleted() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Increments the count of completed tasks by one.
    incrementFailed() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Increments the count of failed tasks by one.
    incrementRejected() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Increments the count of rejected tasks by one.
    incrementSubmitted() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Increments the count of submitted tasks by one.
    interruptibility() - Method in interface com.cmw.adaptive.task.AdaptiveTask
    Returns the interruption policy for this task.
    Interruptibility - Enum Class in com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums
    Defines the interruption policy for tasks executed by the AdaptiveExecutor.
    INTERRUPTIBLE - Enum constant in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.Interruptibility
    Indicates that a task can be safely interrupted if the executor needs to scale down workers or shut down.
    isAlive() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.WorkerHandle
    Checks if the worker thread is still alive.

    J

    join() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.WorkerHandle
    Waits for the worker thread to finish execution.

    L

    longestExecutionTimeMillis() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the longest execution time among completed tasks.
    longestQueueWaitMillis() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the longest time any task has spent waiting in the queue.
    LOW - Enum constant in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.TaskPriority
    Indicates that a task has the lowest scheduling priority and will be executed after all HIGH and NORMAL priority tasks.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.cmw.adaptive.Main
    Entry point for the demonstration.
    Main - Class in com.cmw.adaptive
    Demonstrates the usage of the AdaptiveExecutor with a mix of high and low priority tasks.
    Main() - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.Main
     
    markCompleted() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Marks the task as completed by recording the completion timestamp.
    markStarted() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Marks the task as started by recording the start timestamp.
    maxWorkers() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Returns the maximum number of workers allowed in this executor.
    maxWorkers() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the maxWorkers record component.
    metrics() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Returns the runtime metrics instance associated with this executor.
    minWorkers() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Returns the minimum number of workers that should always remain active.
    minWorkers() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the minWorkers record component.

    N

    name() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.WorkerHandle
    Returns the name of the worker thread.
    NON_INTERRUPTIBLE - Enum constant in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.Interruptibility
    Indicates that a task should not be interrupted and will be allowed to complete before the executor terminates.
    NORMAL - Enum constant in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.TaskPriority
    Indicates that a task has normal scheduling priority and will be executed after all HIGH priority tasks but before LOW priority tasks.

    O

    offer(TrackedTask) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.queue.PriorityTaskQueue
    Adds a task to the queue with its associated priority.

    P

    peakQueueSize() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the maximum number of tasks that have been waiting in the queue simultaneously.
    peakWorkers() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the peak number of workers that have been active simultaneously.
    PidScalingStrategy - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.scaling
    Scaling strategy based on a PID controller.
    PidScalingStrategy(double, double, double) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.PidScalingStrategy
    Creates a PID scaling strategy.
    previousThroughputPerWorker() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the previousThroughputPerWorker record component.
    priority() - Method in interface com.cmw.adaptive.task.AdaptiveTask
    Returns the scheduling priority of this task.
    PriorityTaskQueue - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.queue
    Thread-safe priority queue for managing tasks in the AdaptiveExecutor.
    PriorityTaskQueue() - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.queue.PriorityTaskQueue
     
    PriorityTaskWrapper - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.queue
    Wrapper for tasks that need to be prioritized in the priority queue.
    PriorityTaskWrapper(TrackedTask) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.queue.PriorityTaskWrapper
    Creates a new priority task wrapper for the given tracked task.

    Q

    queueSize() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Returns the current number of tasks waiting in the queue.
    queueSize() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the queueSize record component.
    queueWaitTimeNanos() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Time spent waiting in the queue before execution started.

    R

    recordExecutionTime(long) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when a task completes execution to record its execution time.
    recordQueueWaitTime(long) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when a task is dequeued for execution to record its wait time in the queue.
    rejectedTasks() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of tasks that were rejected due to capacity limits.
    removeWorker() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Removes a worker from the pool if the minimum worker limit has not been reached.
    run() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingManager
     
    run() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.Worker
     

    S

    scaleDown() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when the executor scales down by removing a worker.
    scaleDownEvents() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of scale-down events that have occurred since startup.
    scaleUp() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when the executor scales up by adding a new worker.
    scaleUpEvents() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of scale-up events that have occurred since startup.
    ScalingContext - Record Class in com.cmw.adaptive.scaling
    Immutable context object containing metrics and state information used by the ScalingStrategy to make scaling decisions.
    ScalingContext(int, int, int, int, int, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Creates an instance of a ScalingContext record class.
    ScalingManager - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.scaling
    Manages the dynamic scaling of worker threads in the AdaptiveExecutor based on a provided ScalingStrategy.
    ScalingManager(AdaptiveExecutor, AtomicBoolean, ScalingStrategy) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingManager
    Creates a new ScalingManager for the given executor and scaling strategy.
    ScalingStrategy - Interface in com.cmw.adaptive.scaling
    Interface for defining scaling strategies used by the AdaptiveExecutor.
    shutdown() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Gracefully shuts down the executor.
    size() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.queue.PriorityTaskQueue
    Returns the current number of tasks waiting in the queue.
    startedAtNanos() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Returns the timestamp when the task was marked as started.
    stop() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.WorkerHandle
    Signals the worker thread to stop and interrupts it if it's waiting.
    submit(TrackedTask) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Submits a task for execution.
    submittedAtNanos() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Returns the timestamp when the task was submitted to the executor.
    submittedTasks() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of tasks that have been submitted for execution.
    successRate() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the percentage of successfully completed tasks.

    T

    take() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.queue.PriorityTaskQueue
    Retrieves and removes the highest priority task from the queue, waiting if necessary until a task becomes available.
    task() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TrackedTask
    Returns the wrapped task.
    TaskContext - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.task
    Encapsulates execution metadata for a task, including timestamps for submission, start, and completion.
    TaskContext() - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Creates a new TaskContext with the submission timestamp set to the current time.
    TaskPriority - Enum Class in com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums
    Defines the scheduling priority levels for tasks executed by the AdaptiveExecutor.
    ThresholdScalingStrategy - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.scaling
    A simple scaling strategy that adjusts the number of worker threads based on the current queue size and CPU load.
    ThresholdScalingStrategy() - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ThresholdScalingStrategy
     
    throughputPerWorker() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns the value of the throughputPerWorker record component.
    throughputTasksPerSecond() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the average throughput since executor startup.
    toString() - Method in record class com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    totalExecutionTimeMillis() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total execution time of all completed tasks in milliseconds.
    totalLatencyNanos() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TaskContext
    Total time from submission to completion.
    totalQueueWaitTimeMillis() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total time tasks have spent waiting in the queue in milliseconds.
    trackedTask() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.queue.PriorityTaskWrapper
    Returns the wrapped tracked task.
    TrackedTask - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.task
    Wrapper around an AdaptiveTask that attaches execution metadata through a TaskContext.
    TrackedTask - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.worker
    Represents a task that has been wrapped with execution metadata for tracking purposes within the AdaptiveExecutor.
    TrackedTask() - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.TrackedTask
     
    TrackedTask(AdaptiveTask) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TrackedTask
    Creates a tracked task with a fresh task context.
    TrackedTask(AdaptiveTask, TaskContext) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.task.TrackedTask
    Creates a tracked task with the given task context.

    U

    updateQueueSize(int) - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Updates the current queue size and checks if it exceeds the previous peak.
    uptimeSeconds() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the uptime of the executor in seconds.

    V

    value() - Method in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.TaskPriority
    Returns the integer value associated with this priority level.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.Interruptibility
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.TaskPriority
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.Interruptibility
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.cmw.adaptive.task.enums.TaskPriority
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    Worker - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.worker
    Worker thread responsible for executing tasks from the AdaptiveExecutor's priority queue.
    Worker(PriorityTaskQueue, AtomicBoolean, ExecutorMetrics) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.Worker
    Creates a new Worker with the given task queue, running flag, and metrics.
    workerBusy() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when a worker thread starts executing a task.
    workerCount() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
    Returns the current number of active worker threads.
    WorkerHandle - Class in com.cmw.adaptive.worker
    Handle for managing the lifecycle of a worker thread in the AdaptiveExecutor.
    WorkerHandle(Thread, AtomicBoolean) - Constructor for class com.cmw.adaptive.worker.WorkerHandle
    Creates a new WorkerHandle for the given thread and running flag.
    workerIdle() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when a worker thread finishes executing a task and becomes idle.
    workersCreated() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of worker threads that have been created since startup.
    workersDestroyed() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Returns the total number of worker threads that have been destroyed since startup.
    workerStarted() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when a worker thread starts executing a task.
    workerStopped() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Should be called when a worker thread finishes executing a task and becomes idle.
    workerUtilizationPercent() - Method in class com.cmw.adaptive.metrics.ExecutorMetrics
    Estimates worker utilization over the executor lifetime.
